name: Remove Duplicate Rows
description: This node take an array of fields and compare the rows on those fields. From the matches it would randomly take one row and drop the rest.
input: It accepts a DataFrame as input from the previous Node
output: The output Dataframe is the same as the input Dataframe with the duplicate rows removed

fields.name: order
fields.title: Order
fields.description: Whether to take the first or last matching record when removing duplicates

fields.name: inputCols
fields.title: Columns
fields.description: The columns to be selected for match
